events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: motor circuits & disconnects, disconnect not within sight, tested/inspected stage. NEC Art. 430 requires disconnect within sight of motor/controller (430.102). Not within sight = non-compliant. Fail.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
"decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],

  "findings": [
    "Motor disconnect is not within sight of the motor/controller, violating NEC 430.102 sight requirement",
    "No qualifying lockable disconnect observed in line-of-sight, creating unsafe isolation condition"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a disconnect within sight of the motor and controller, or provide a lockable disconnecting means per NEC 430.102(B) exception",
    "Re-inspect and verify line-of-sight and lockout/tagout capability before energizing"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430 requires the motor disconnecting means to be in sight of the motor and its controller. A disconnect not within sight is non-compliant and unsafe for isolation during maintenance.",
  "references": ["NEC 430.102", "NEC Art. 430"]
}
